title: Study Area Map
purpose: Shows the two main basins used for transfer learning.
student_takeaway: Students understand where the data comes from and why two basins matter.

title: Observation Density Map
purpose: Shows where the dataset has stronger coverage.
student_takeaway: More coverage means more reliable learning from the ocean environment.

title: Mean SST Map
purpose: Displays the thermal structure of the surface ocean.
student_takeaway: It helps explain why temperature-based events can be learned by the model.

title: SST Anomaly Map
student_takeaway: This is central to thermal anomaly detection and climate interpretation.

title: Chlorophyll Map
student_takeaway: Students can see that the project also understands ecosystem patterns.

title: Wind Speed Map
purpose: Shows atmospheric forcing over the ocean.
student_takeaway: Students see how atmosphere and ocean are coupled.

title: Wave Climate Map
student_takeaway: It supports the climate-risk part of the project.

title: Cyclone Influence Map
purpose: Shows where ocean states are affected by cyclones.
student_takeaway: This is intuitive for explaining storm-ocean coupling.

title: Bathymetry Map
purpose: Shows deep and shallow ocean regions.
student_takeaway: This explains physical ocean context for non-coding students.

title: Ocean State Map
purpose: Shows dominant ocean state at each location.
student_takeaway: This is one of the clearest figures for non-coding students.

title: Climate Risk Map
student_takeaway: Ideal for presenting the project impact.

title: Year-wise Climate Risk Trend
purpose: Shows how risk classes evolve over time.
student_takeaway: Students can follow the 2020–2024 risk story.

title: Basin-wise Ocean State Comparison
student_takeaway: This makes the need for transfer learning visually obvious.

title: Model Performance Comparison
student_takeaway: Students understand the final achievement of the project.

title: Seasonal SST Story
purpose: Shows how ocean surface temperature changes by season.
student_takeaway: Students connect monsoon climate with ocean dynamics.

title: Ocean-State Hotspot Scatter
purpose: Shows spatial hotspots of ocean-state classes.
student_takeaway: Students see abnormal event locations as map points.
